title: Best AI Research Tools for Academics and Researchers - Litmaps
description:
#### Google AutoML

Google AutoML is an advanced AI platform that allows researchers to build machine learning models without needing extensive coding expertise. It is particularly useful for researchers working on predictive analytics, image recognition, and natural language processing projects.

#### R

R is an open-source statistical computing language widely used for data analysis, visualization, and machine learning. It is highly flexible and supported by a strong community, making it ideal for advanced statistical analysis. However, it requires coding knowledge and has a steep learning curve.
